steps.stdout:
quilt-nightly

Usage:
  npx quilt-nightly --cc [options]
  npx quilt-nightly --codex [options]
  npx quilt-nightly --rlm [options] [-- <command...>]
  npx quilt-nightly --aegis [options] [-- <command...>]
  npx quilt-nightly --amp [options] [-- <command...>]

Options:
  --cc                     Launch a Claude Code container flow via API
  --codex                  Launch a Codex container flow via API
  --rlm                    Launch an RLM-ready container flow via API
  --aegis                  Launch an Aegis container flow via API
  --amp                    Launch an AMP daemon container flow via API
  -m, --mesh               Use the RLM mesh helper mode (only with --rlm)
  -s, --s, --swarm [n]     Launch an Aegis swarm (only with --aegis, default n=2)
  --name <name>            Container name (default: auto-generated)
  --keep                   Keep container after terminal exits
  --                       Pass a startup command into the attached shell
  --help                   Show this help

Automatic defaults (no flags needed):
  api_url=https://backend.quilt.sh
  cc_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/cc:latest
  codex_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/codex:latest
  rlm_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/rlm:latest
  aegis_image_ref=prod-gui
  amp_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/amp:latest

steps.expect_stdout:
quilt-nightly

Usage:
  npx quilt-nightly --cc [options]
  npx quilt-nightly --codex [options]
  npx quilt-nightly --rlm [options] [-- <command...>]
  npx quilt-nightly --aegis [options] [-- <command...>]
  npx quilt-nightly --amp [options] [-- <command...>]

Options:
  --cc                     Launch a Claude Code container flow via API
  --codex                  Launch a Codex container flow via API
  --rlm                    Launch an RLM-ready container flow via API
  --aegis                  Launch an Aegis container flow via API
  --amp                    Launch an AMP daemon container flow via API
  -m, --mesh               Use the RLM mesh helper mode (only with --rlm)
  -s, --s, --swarm [n]     Launch an Aegis swarm (only with --aegis, default n=2)
  --name <name>            Container name (default: auto-generated)
  --keep                   Keep container after terminal exits
  --                       Pass a startup command into the attached shell
  --help                   Show this help

Automatic defaults (no flags needed):

  codex_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/codex:latest
  rlm_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/rlm:latest

  amp_image_ref=backend.quilt.sh/nightly/amp:latest

steps.stdout:
quilt-aegis doctor --json
quilt-aegis shell
quilt-aegis serve --mode headful --addr 0.0.0.0:7878
aegis usage
aegis native doctor

steps.expect_stdout:
quilt-aegis doctor --json
quilt-aegis shell
quilt-aegis serve --mode headful --addr 0.0.0.0:7878
aegis usage
aegis native doctor

steps.stdout:
quilt-amp doctor --json
quilt-amp bootstrap --json
quilt-amp launch --addr 0.0.0.0:7001 --json
amp inspect system --server http://127.0.0.1:7001 --json
amp msg watch --server ws://127.0.0.1:7001/ws --as owner --token $QUILT_AMP_AGENT_TOKEN --auto-ack

steps.expect_stdout:
quilt-amp doctor --json
quilt-amp bootstrap --json
quilt-amp launch --addr 0.0.0.0:7001 --json
amp inspect system --server http://127.0.0.1:7001 --json
amp msg watch --server ws://127.0.0.1:7001/ws --as owner --token $QUILT_AMP_AGENT_TOKEN --auto-ack
